result.goldenSql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_active THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM enrollments GROUP BY is_active

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score), 2) AS avg_attendance FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY avg_attendance DESC
SELECT course_type, ROUND(AVG(credits), 2) AS avg_credits FROM courses GROUP BY course_type ORDER BY avg_credits DESC

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_difficulty FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY avg_difficulty DESC

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score), 2) AS avg_exam_score FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY avg_exam_score DESC
SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(s.gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa FROM departments d JOIN students s ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_gpa DESC
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::int AS enrollment_year, ROUND(AVG(gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa FROM students WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY enrollment_year ORDER BY enrollment_year
SELECT current_semester, ROUND(AVG(gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY current_semester ORDER BY current_semester

result.goldenSql: SELECT cs.semester_type, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cs.semester_type ORDER BY cs.semester_type
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, p.academic_title, ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.academic_title ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(g.project_score), 2) AS avg_project_score FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id WHERE g.project_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_project_score DESC

SELECT g.grade_value, ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score), 2) AS avg_exam, ROUND(AVG(g.project_score), 2) AS avg_project, ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score), 2) AS avg_attendance FROM grades g WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.grade_value ORDER BY g.grade_value

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(cs.max_students), 1) AS avg_max_students FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_max_students DESC

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours), 1) AS avg_workload_hours FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC
SELECT building, COUNT(*) AS classroom_count FROM classrooms GROUP BY building ORDER BY classroom_count DESC
SELECT building, SUM(capacity) AS total_capacity, COUNT(*) AS room_count FROM classrooms GROUP BY building ORDER BY total_capacity DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN capacity <= 30 THEN '1-30' WHEN capacity <= 60 THEN '31-60' WHEN capacity <= 100 THEN '61-100' WHEN capacity <= 200 THEN '101-200' ELSE '200+' END AS capacity_range, COUNT(*) AS room_count FROM classrooms GROUP BY capacity_range ORDER BY MIN(capacity)

SELECT CASE WHEN has_projector AND has_computers THEN 'Both' WHEN has_projector THEN 'Projector Only' WHEN has_computers THEN 'Computers Only' ELSE 'Neither' END AS equipment, COUNT(*) AS room_count, ROUND(AVG(capacity), 0) AS avg_capacity FROM classrooms GROUP BY equipment ORDER BY room_count DESC

SELECT building, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_projector, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS projector_pct FROM classrooms GROUP BY building ORDER BY projector_pct DESC
SELECT building, COUNT(*) AS computer_room_count FROM classrooms WHERE has_computers = true GROUP BY building ORDER BY computer_room_count DESC

SELECT cs.academic_year, ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall_rating, COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id GROUP BY cs.academic_year ORDER BY cs.academic_year

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(COUNT(cs.id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0), 1) AS avg_sections_per_prof FROM course_sections cs JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = p.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_sections_per_prof DESC
SELECT d.name AS department, co.course_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM courses co JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name, co.course_type ORDER BY d.name, co.course_type
SELECT c.course_type, COUNT(*) AS course_count FROM courses c GROUP BY c.course_type ORDER BY course_count DESC
SELECT co.name AS course, co.code, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM courses co JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = co.id GROUP BY co.id, co.name, co.code ORDER BY section_count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT co.name AS course, co.code, d.name AS department FROM courses co JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id WHERE co.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT cs.course_id FROM course_sections cs JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id) ORDER BY co.name
SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(c.id) AS course_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY course_count DESC
SELECT c.name AS course, c.code, COUNT(p.id) AS prerequisite_count FROM courses c JOIN prerequisites p ON p.course_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code ORDER BY prerequisite_count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN p.course_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Has Prerequisites' ELSE 'No Prerequisites' END AS status, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS course_count FROM courses c LEFT JOIN prerequisites p ON p.course_id = c.id GROUP BY status
SELECT d.name AS department, SUM(c.credits) AS total_credits FROM departments d JOIN courses c ON c.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY total_credits DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall_rating FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, d.building AS dept_building, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT cl.building, ', ' ORDER BY cl.building) AS classroom_buildings FROM departments d JOIN courses co ON co.department_id = d.id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = co.id JOIN classrooms cl ON cl.id = cs.classroom_id GROUP BY d.name, d.building ORDER BY d.name
SELECT d.name AS department, co.credits, COUNT(*) AS course_count FROM courses co JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name, co.credits ORDER BY d.name, co.credits

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall, ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor, ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating), 2) AS avg_content, ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_difficulty FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY d.name

SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(g.id) AS total_grades, SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value = '2.0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failures, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value = '2.0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(g.id), 1) AS fail_rate_pct FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY fail_rate_pct DESC

SELECT cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count FROM enrollments e JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id GROUP BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type ORDER BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type

SELECT d.name AS department, cs.academic_year, COUNT(e.id) AS enrollments FROM enrollments e JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name, cs.academic_year ORDER BY cs.academic_year, d.name

SELECT co.name AS course, COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY evaluation_count DESC

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_difficulty, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name HAVING COUNT(ce.id) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_difficulty DESC
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT overall_rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM course_evaluations GROUP BY overall_rating ORDER BY overall_rating

SELECT ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall, ROUND(AVG(professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor, ROUND(AVG(content_rating), 2) AS avg_content, ROUND(AVG(difficulty_rating), 2) AS avg_difficulty FROM course_evaluations

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS recommend_pct FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score), 2) AS avg_exam, ROUND(AVG(g.project_score), 2) AS avg_project FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY d.name

SELECT co.name AS course, COUNT(g.id) AS total_grades, SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value = '2.0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value = '2.0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(g.id), 1) AS fail_rate_pct FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name HAVING COUNT(g.id) >= 5 ORDER BY fail_rate_pct DESC
SELECT sc.scholarship_type, ROUND(AVG(s.gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.scholarship_type ORDER BY avg_gpa DESC

SELECT COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'No title') AS academic_title, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade, COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.academic_title ORDER BY avg_grade DESC

result.goldenSql: SELECT cs.semester_type, co.course_type, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cs.semester_type, co.course_type ORDER BY cs.semester_type, co.course_type
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT g.grade_value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grades g WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.grade_value ORDER BY g.grade_value

SELECT d.name AS department, g.grade_value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = co.department_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.name, g.grade_value ORDER BY d.name, g.grade_value

SELECT cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade, COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type ORDER BY cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT g.grade_value, ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score), 2) AS avg_exam_score, COUNT(*) AS count FROM grades g WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.grade_value ORDER BY g.grade_value

SELECT DISTINCT ON (sc.academic_year) sc.academic_year, d.name AS department, SUM(sc.amount) AS total_scholarship FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id GROUP BY sc.academic_year, d.name ORDER BY sc.academic_year, total_scholarship DESC

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours), 1) AS avg_workload_hours, COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.name HAVING COUNT(ce.id) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT building, room_number, capacity, has_projector, has_computers FROM classrooms ORDER BY capacity DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT co.name AS course, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students, COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled, ROUND(COUNT(e.id)::numeric / cs.max_students, 2) AS fill_ratio FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id GROUP BY co.name, cs.id, cs.section_number, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students HAVING COUNT(e.id) > cs.max_students ORDER BY fill_ratio DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT CASE WHEN is_mandatory THEN 'Mandatory' ELSE 'Optional' END AS prerequisite_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM prerequisites GROUP BY is_mandatory

SELECT CASE WHEN grade_value = '2.0' THEN 'Fail' ELSE 'Pass' END AS result, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage FROM grades WHERE grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY result

SELECT c.name AS prerequisite_course, c.code, COUNT(p.course_id) AS required_by_count FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON c.id = p.prerequisite_course_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code ORDER BY required_by_count DESC

SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade, COUNT(g.id) AS grades_given FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name ORDER BY avg_grade DESC
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating), 2) AS avg_content_rating, ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor_rating FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name HAVING COUNT(ce.id) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_professor_rating DESC

SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM professors p LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name ORDER BY section_count DESC

SELECT cs.academic_year, ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor_rating FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id GROUP BY cs.academic_year ORDER BY cs.academic_year

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.hire_date)::int AS hire_year, ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating), 2) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count FROM professors p JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id JOIN course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id WHERE p.hire_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hire_year ORDER BY hire_year

SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, p.academic_title, ROUND(AVG(g.grade_value::numeric), 2) AS avg_grade, COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = g.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.academic_title HAVING COUNT(g.id) >= 10 ORDER BY avg_grade ASC LIMIT 10
result.details: Golden SQL execution failed: cannot cast type grade_value to numeric

result.goldenSql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM hire_date)::int AS hire_year, COUNT(*) AS hired_count FROM professors WHERE hire_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hire_year ORDER BY hire_year
SELECT COALESCE(academic_title, 'No title') AS academic_title, COUNT(*) AS professor_count FROM professors GROUP BY academic_title ORDER BY professor_count DESC

SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.course_id) AS distinct_courses FROM professors p JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name ORDER BY distinct_courses DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN professors p ON p.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY professor_count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN cs.professor_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Has Sections' ELSE 'No Sections' END AS status, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count FROM professors p LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id GROUP BY status

SELECT co.name AS course, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS recommend_pct FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC
SELECT cl.building, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM course_sections cs JOIN classrooms cl ON cl.id = cs.classroom_id GROUP BY cl.building ORDER BY section_count DESC
SELECT academic_year, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM scholarships GROUP BY academic_year ORDER BY academic_year

SELECT CASE WHEN amount < 500 THEN 'Under 500' WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '500-999' WHEN amount < 2000 THEN '1000-1999' WHEN amount < 3000 THEN '2000-2999' ELSE '3000+' END AS amount_range, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarships GROUP BY amount_range ORDER BY MIN(amount)

SELECT CASE WHEN sc.amount < 500 THEN 'Under 500' WHEN sc.amount < 1000 THEN '500-999' WHEN sc.amount < 2000 THEN '1000-1999' ELSE '2000+' END AS amount_range, ROUND(AVG(s.gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY amount_range ORDER BY MIN(sc.amount)
SELECT scholarship_type, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount FROM scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type ORDER BY avg_amount DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, SUM(sc.amount) AS total_scholarship FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END AS payment_status, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM scholarships GROUP BY payment_status

SELECT d.name AS department, ROUND(AVG(sc.amount), 2) AS avg_scholarship_per_award FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_scholarship_per_award DESC
SELECT scholarship_type, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS recipient_count FROM scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type ORDER BY recipient_count DESC
SELECT scholarship_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC
SELECT semester_type, scholarship_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM scholarships GROUP BY semester_type, scholarship_type ORDER BY semester_type, scholarship_type

SELECT co.name AS course, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students, COUNT(e.id) AS enrolled, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(e.id) / cs.max_students, 1) AS fill_rate_pct FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id AND e.is_active = true GROUP BY co.name, cs.id, cs.academic_year, cs.semester_type, cs.max_students ORDER BY fill_rate_pct DESC
SELECT academic_year, semester_type, COUNT(*) AS section_count FROM course_sections GROUP BY academic_year, semester_type ORDER BY academic_year, semester_type
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, date_of_birth))::int AS age, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students WHERE date_of_birth IS NOT NULL GROUP BY age ORDER BY age
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::int AS enrollment_year, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students GROUP BY enrollment_year ORDER BY enrollment_year

SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS student_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0), 1) AS student_professor_ratio FROM departments d LEFT JOIN students s ON s.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN professors p ON p.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY student_professor_ratio DESC
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_of_birth)::int AS birth_year, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students WHERE date_of_birth IS NOT NULL GROUP BY birth_year ORDER BY birth_year

SELECT co.name AS course, COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS student_count FROM enrollments e JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE e.is_active = true GROUP BY co.name ORDER BY student_count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN gpa < 2.5 THEN '2.0 - 2.49' WHEN gpa < 3.0 THEN '2.5 - 2.99' WHEN gpa < 3.5 THEN '3.0 - 3.49' WHEN gpa < 4.0 THEN '3.5 - 3.99' WHEN gpa < 4.5 THEN '4.0 - 4.49' ELSE '4.5 - 5.0' END AS gpa_range, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gpa_range ORDER BY MIN(gpa)

SELECT scholarship_count, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM (SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count FROM scholarships GROUP BY student_id) sub GROUP BY scholarship_count ORDER BY scholarship_count
SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN students s ON s.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY student_count DESC

SELECT d.name AS department, s.current_semester, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students s JOIN departments d ON d.id = s.department_id GROUP BY d.name, s.current_semester ORDER BY d.name, s.current_semester
SELECT current_semester, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students GROUP BY current_semester ORDER BY current_semester

SELECT co.name AS course, co.code, COUNT(e.id) AS total_enrollments FROM enrollments e JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN courses co ON co.id = cs.course_id GROUP BY co.id, co.name, co.code ORDER BY total_enrollments DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name AS professor, p.academic_title, ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor_rating, COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count FROM course_evaluations ce JOIN enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id JOIN course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id JOIN professors p ON p.id = cs.professor_id GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.academic_title HAVING COUNT(ce.id) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_professor_rating DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS student, s.index_number, SUM(sc.amount) AS total_scholarship FROM scholarships sc JOIN students s ON s.id = sc.student_id GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.index_number ORDER BY total_scholarship DESC LIMIT 10
result.details: Row 1 values differ (positional comparison, column names ignored)

result.goldenSql: SELECT s.first_name, s.last_name, s.index_number, s.gpa FROM students s WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.gpa DESC LIMIT 10
